judge.reason: The primary purpose of ath11k_wmi_send_bcn_offload_control_cmd is to construct and send a WMI beacon offload control command, not to manage reference counts. The only refcount operation (dev_kfree_skb) occurs on an error path to release the allocated skb, which is incidental to the main command-sending logic.
